export const getSubjects=(courseId,yearId,semId)=>{const course=coursesData[courseId];if(!course||!course.years[yearId]||!course.years[yearId].semesters[semId]){return[];}return course.years[yearId].semesters[semId];};export const getAllCourses=()=>{return Object.entries(coursesData).map(_ref=>{let[id,data]=_ref;return{id,name:data.name,icon:data.icon,duration:data.duration};});};export const getCourseInfo=courseId=>{return coursesData[courseId]||null;};export const getYearsForCourse=courseId=>{const course=coursesData[courseId];if(!course)return[];return Object.entries(course.years).map(_ref2=>{let[yearId,yearData]=_ref2;return{id:yearId,name:yearData.name,semesters:Object.keys(yearData.semesters).length};});};export const getTotalSubjectsCount=courseId=>{const course=coursesData[courseId];if(!course)return 0;let total=0;Object.values(course.years).forEach(year=>{Object.values(year.semesters).forEach(semester=>{total+=semester.length;});});return total;};export const getTotalMaterialsCount=courseId=>{const course=coursesData[courseId];if(!course)return 0;let total=0;Object.values(course.years).forEach(year=>{Object.values(year.semesters).forEach(semester=>{semester.forEach(subject=>{total+=subject.materials;});});});return total;};
